property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

properties.property: A table which allows the [[party]] to buy [[item]]s: * [[Rhapsotea]] - 250 [[Dark Dollar]]s * [[Scarlixir]] - 450 Dark Dollars * [[Waferguard]] - 900 Dark Dollars * [[Scarf Mark]] - 900 Dark Dollars

property.name: description
property.value: Allows the [[party]] to sell their [[item]]s

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] can donate money to the fountain, which causes the waterfall to the north to briefly part, revealing a hidden entryway.

property.name: description
property.value: The old man's study.

properties.property: THE PROPHECY, WHICH WHISPERS AMONG THE SHADOWS.
THE LEGEND OF THIS WORLD. <DELTARUNE.>
A WORLD BASKED IN PUREST LIGHT. BENEATH IT, GREW ETERNAL NIGHT.
IF FOUNTAINS FREED, THE ROARING CRIES. AND TITANS SHAPE FROM DARKENED EYES.

property.name: description
property.value: ''JOCKINGTON GROWS THE BEARD''

properties.property: THE LIGHT AND DARK, BOTH BURNING DIRE. A COUNTDOWN TO THE EARTH'S EXPIRE.
THE POINTY-HEADED WILL SAY "TOOTHPASTE," AND THEN "BOY."
BUT LO, ON HOPES AND DREAMS THEY SEND. THREE HEROES AT THE WORLD'S END.
BUT LO, ON HOPES AND DREAMS THEY SEND. THREE HEROES AT THE WORLD'S END.
The Axe which nests beyond the pyre Awakes from rest by golden choir 3 tunes bekiss'd in dulcet wire Which whispers in the darkest mire.

property.name: description
property.value: ''A CONUNDRUM'S FIRST FOUR TONES.''

property.name: description
property.value: ''A CONUNDRUM'S LAST FOUR TONES.''

property.name: description
property.value: ''Melodies three, there be. Two in the southern towers. One where gold strikes water.''

properties.property: THE QUEEN'S CHARIOT CANNOT BE STOPPED.

property.name: description
property.value: ''A CONUMDRUM'S MULTITUDE TONES.''

properties.property: THE KNIGHT WHICH MAKES WITH BLACKENED KNIFE.
THE KNIGHT WHICH MAKES WITH BLACKENED KNIFE.
SHALL DUEL WITH HEROES STRIFE BY STRIFE.
The scent of glass and incense. A certain power steels within you.
A glass tapestry rings above you. Strangely, no matter how turn to look... ... its perspective never changes.
The old man's existence made you imagine Ralsei with a beard. You are filled with the power of conceptual bearded Ralsei.
The hearth grows brightly, pressing the night's chill away. You are filled with a certain power.
Stacks of books, with characters that cannot be read... You are filled with the power of not actually reading the text.
Down the corridor, darkness lies in wait... Shining only in your own eyes, the light defies it.

property.name: description
property.value: Kris must play the piano with the indicated directions to light up the room and unlock the way forward.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Danctuaries/Puzzles#The first piano playing puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: By pressing the pressure plates, [[Kris]] reveals the solution to the puzzle: ''left'', ''down'', ''left'', ''down'', ''left'', ''right''.

property.name: description
property.value: Pressing any of the pressure plates in the dark maze temprarily lights up the room.

property.name: description
property.value: Pressing the yellow pressure plates produces yellow ripples that temporarily highlight the path.

property.name: description
property.value: The old man guides the party through the dark room. Pressing the pressure plates reveals one part of the solution to the puzzle: ''up'', ''up'', ''down'', ''down'', ''left'', ''left'', ''right'', ''up''. Solving the puzzle lights up the room and unlocks the way forward.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The second piano playing puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] must locate the colored pianos and navigate the respectively colored bookshelves to their proper locations. This allows them to walk across and progress to the next areas.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The first bookshelf pushing puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: Pressing any of the pressure plates in the dark maze temprarily lights up the room.

property.name: description
property.value: Pressing this pressure plate reveals the first set of notes that must be played to solve the piano puzzle to the north.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The third piano playing puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: By switching octaves, [[Kris]] must navigate the colored bookshelf to their proper places.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The second bookshelf pushing puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: Entering this room reveals the second set of notes that must be played to solve the piano puzzle to the north.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The third piano playing puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: A golden piano that must be played to open the hearth in the [[Study]]. The solution is as follows: ''up'', ''neutral'', ''up'', ''left'', ''down'', ''neutral'', ''right'', ''neutral'', ''right'', ''down'', ''left'', ''neutral''.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The golden piano puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] must find the two solutions to the puzzle and play them in order: ''left'', ''down'', ''left'', ''right'', ''down'', ''down'', ''right'', ''right''

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The third piano playing puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: Defeating [[Miss Mizzle]] reveals the first portion of the golden piano puzzle solution.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The golden piano puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: Pressing this pressure plate reveals the second portion of the golden piano puzzle solution.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The golden piano puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: Interacting with the golden ripple while having the [[Claimb Claws]] exposes more of the ripple maze.

property.name: description
property.value: Pressing the yellow pressure plates produces yellow ripples that temporarily highlight the path.

property.name: description
property.value: Pressing this pressure plate reveals the final portion of the golden piano piano puzzle solution.

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuaries/Puzzles#The golden piano puzzle

property.name: description
property.value: Awarded for completing the two preceding climbing sections fast enough.

property.name: description
property.value: Requires the [[Sheet Music]] play properly. Once played, the center door in the [[Study]] opens. [[Kris]] can then play various songs, which elicit reactions from [[Susie]] and [[Ralsei]].

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Sanctuary#Organ

property.name: description
property.value: After discovering the [[Dark Fountain]] at the end of the hallway, [[Susie]] encounters the [[Knight]] blocking the way. [[Kris]] attempts to ascend the hallway while avoiding sword projectiles. Regardless of Kris's progress, they and Susie are eventually knocked down into the lower levels of the Dark Sanctuary.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] is injured after falling into the lower levels of the Dark Sanctuary. [[Susie]] attempts to heal them, but [[Ralsei]] arrives and heals Kris in her place. Ralsei then rejoins the party.

property.name: description
property.value: In a dynamic conversation, [[Susie]] asks about the glass tapestries, to which [[Ralsei]] explains that they depict the [[prophecy]].

property.name: description
property.value: [[Ralsei]] explains that the prophecy he told was a summary of the prophecy depicted in the tapestries.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] regards the prophecy predicting the future as a big deal. Shortly after, a shrouded figure darts past, startling the [[party]].

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] notices the prophecy tapestry depicting the three heroes. Shortly after, a hammer destroys the tapestry and plunges the room in complete darkness.

property.name: description
property.value: When reaching the end of the maze, a [[Titan Spawn]] appears and begins chasing the [[party]] back.

property.name: description
property.value: The party meets an old man who turns on the lights. He requests the [[party]] take them back to his study and follows behind at a slow pace.

property.name: description
property.value: The old man requests that they retrieve a green book for him. Susie refuses and attempts to open the door on her own, while Ralsei transforms into his "Stool Forme" to help the old man. When Susie reluctantly agrees to retrieve the book, the door opens, which allows the [[party]] to progress.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] notices that the tapestry depicting the heroes has returned. [[Ralsei]] explains that any prophecy tapestry can reappear anywhere else since the prophecy itself is unchanging.

object.name: The old man reveals the way

property.name: description
property.value: The old man shatters the prophecy tapestry, revealing the way out of the room. [[Susie]] and [[Ralsei]] run ahead while the old man stays behind and can be talked to.

property.name: description
property.value: Appears if "Further left" is chosen when the old man prompts an answer from [[Kris]].

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] questions [[Ralsei]] on his knowledge of the [[prophecy]]. Ralsei avoids her questioning and notices a light switch nearby. When the lights come on, the [[party]] finds themselves past a dropoff, and they fall into the Dark Zone.

property.name: description
property.value: As the lights progressively dim, [[Jackenstein]] repeatedly warns the [[party]] not to come any closer.

property.name: description
property.value: After defeating [[Jackenstein]], he slams into a chandelier. [[Ralsei]] attempts to heal him, to no avail, while [[Susie]] talks with the old man. The old man challenges Susie to heal his finger, leading her to inadvertently heal Jackenstein. Grateful, Jackenstein gives the party the [[Claimb Claws]].

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] offers to heal [[Kris]] should they need it. This upgrades her healing magic to [[OKHeal]].

property.name: description
property.value: When reaching the end of the maze, a [[Titan Spawn]] appears and begins chasing the [[party]] back.

property.name: description
property.value: The old man lights up the way and invites the [[party]] over for a tea party.

property.name: description
property.value: The old man invites the [[party]] over for tea, during which [[Susie]] tells him about their adventures so far. After Susie leaves, the old man asks [[Ralsei]] what will happen next and notices [[Kris]] has yet to drink any tea.

property.name: description
property.value: When [[Susie]] unlocks the nearby door, [[Ralsei]] pulls [[Kris]] aside and asks them to close their eyes and think about Susie. Kris can either comply or refuse.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] talks to the old man, who is busy writing a letter. He reveals a prophecy tapestry depicting the solution to the organ puzzle. Susie transcribes the notes on the tapestry and returns to [[Kris]] and [[Ralsei]].

property.name: description
property.value: The [[party]] encounters the [[Knight]] again as they head to the [[Dark Fountain]]. The Knight sends sword projectiles at Kris as they attempt to reach the top.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] chases the [[Knight]] up the stairs and to the [[Grand Door]]. The Knight escapes through the door before Susie can catch up with it, and the party decides to seal the [[Dark Fountain]] and regroup later.

property.name: description
property.value: After unlocking the door to the [[3rd Sanctuary]], the Dark Sanctuary is restored, allowing the party to traverse it again.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] wonders out loud why the [[Knight]] is not stopping her and [[Kris]] from sealing the [[Dark Fountain]]. Kris seals the Fountain and ends up back in the lobby of the [[church]].

property.name: description
property.value: Appears after defeating [[Jackenstein]]. Seeks advice from the [[Bibliox]] on becoming a "righteous hero".

property.name: description
property.value: Appears after defeating [[Jackenstein]]. Relates a long tale which only consists of the letters of the alphabet, including "ñ".

property.name: description
property.value: Warns the [[party]] of the hostile [[Darkner]]s in the area, but requests not to harm them.

property.name: description
property.value: States that come five o'clock, "the shadow will grow".

property.name: description
property.value: Explains the state of the [[Wicabel]] statue next to it.

property.name: description
property.value: A Wicabel statue. Comes to life after restoring the Dark Sanctuary.

property.name: description
property.value: Appears after defeating [[Jackenstein]]. Is seen attacking a [[Guei]].

property.name: description
property.value: Makes wispy noises when interacted with.

property.name: description
property.value: Appears if Guei was recruited by the old man. Is currently studying.

property.name: description
property.value: Appears if Guei was recruited by the old man. Makes wispy noises when interacted with.

property.name: description
property.value: Appears after being defeated. Is sweeping the floor of the study and gives advice on where to go next.

property.name: description
property.value: Gives advice on where to go next.

property.name: page
property.value: Gerson Boom

property.name: description
property.value: Appears after donating money to the fountain. Asks whether the [[party]] had any change to throw in instead.

property.name: description
property.value: Are staring at the [[Organikk]] stature in worship.

property.name: description
property.value: Appears after restoring the Dark Sanctuary. Warns the [[party]] that the golden piano above has been destroyed by a [[Wicabel]].

property.name: description
property.value: Inaccessible to the party. Is seen dancing in place.

property.name: description
property.value: Comments on how their attempts to reach their Holy Princess at the top fail due to slippery legs.

property.name: description
property.value: Promises to never spill or modify a drop of their Holy Princess's love.

property.name: description
property.value: Requests that the [[party]] tell the Holy Princess of their exploits to earn her favor.

property.name: description
property.value: Directs the party to the light up north.

property.name: description
property.value: An unknown creature, hidden in the darkness. Is exposed by directing the ripples toward it when walking.

property.name: description
property.value: An unknown creature, hidden in the darkness. Is exposed by directing the ripples toward it when walking.

property.name: description
property.value: An unknown creature, hidden in the darkness. Is exposed by directing the ripples toward it when walking.

property.name: description
property.value: An unknown creature, hidden in the darkness. Is exposed by directing the ripples toward it when walking.

property.name: description
property.value: Has climbed to the top of the pillar and found no Princess. Considers the possibility of the pillar itself being the Princess.

property.name: description
property.value: Asks if the [[party]] wishes to join the ranks of the Cuptains and encourages the party to climb to the top.

property.name: description
property.value: Notes the organ at the top of the tower but lacks the grip strength to reach it.

property.name: description
property.value: Notes the [[Mizzle]] at the ground level but refuses to climb to her.

property.name: description
property.value: Explains the nature of the Dark Sanctuary and its inhabitants.

property.name: description
property.value: Proclaims that they are the most important since the [[Lightner]]s' church service has never gone on without them.

property.name: page
property.value: Fire Extinguisher

property.name: description
property.value: Explains that the [[Darkner]] next to them is the fire extinguisher.

property.name: description
property.value: Notes that they must charge their jump to temporarily boost their speed.

property.name: description
property.value: Tracks the time taken to complete the preceding climbing segment.

property.name: description
property.value: Tracks the time taken to complete the preceding climbing segment.

property.name: description
property.value: Notices the [[party]] approaching the [[Mizzle]] and rushes to defend her.

property.name: description
property.value: An endless horde of Cuptains charges at the [[party]] in defense of the [[Mizzle]]. The Mizzle wakes up and leaves when the party reaches her.

property.name: description
property.value: When the party approaches the Mizzle, she admonishes the [[Cuptains]] and leaves.

property.name: description
property.value: Offers to take the [[party]] back down to the base of the tower.

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing a Rhapsotea.

property.name: description
property.value: Hidden treasure chest containing slippery gloves that are not obtained.

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing a Scarlixir.

property.name: description
property.value: A pedestal containing Darker Candy. Only one can be taken before the bowl tips over.

property.name: page
property.value: Darker Candy

property.name: description
property.value: Empty treasure chest. When opening it, [[Kris]]'s maximum [[HP]] increases by 1.

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing an Absorb Ax.

property.name: page
property.value: Absorb Ax

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing the Mystic Band.

property.name: page
property.value: Mystic Band

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing a Scarlixir.

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing a Revive Mint

property.name: page
property.value: Revive Mint

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing 500 Dark Dollars]].

property.name: page
property.value: Dark Dollar

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing a Winglade.

property.name: page
property.value: Winglade (item)

property.name: description
property.value: Silver coins scattered throughout the room. They award 5 [[Dark Dollar]]s when collected.

property.name: description
property.value: A gold coin. It awards 20 [[Dark Dollar]]s when collected.

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing a Tension Gem.

property.name: page
property.value: Tension Gem

property.name: description
property.value: Treasure chest containing a Power Band.

property.name: page
property.value: Power Band

property.name: description
property.value: [[Susie]] gives the Sheet Music to [[Kris]] after she transcribes the music in the curtain room.

property.name: page
property.value: Sheet Music

property.name: description
property.value: Chase enemies circle around the area, harming the party if touched.

property.name: description
property.value: Chase enemies circle around the area, harming the party if touched.

property.name: description
property.value: Chase enemies circle around the area, harming the party if touched.

property.name: description
property.value: Chase enemies roam the area, harming the party if touched.

property.name: description
property.value: Chase enemies circle around the area, harming the party if touched.

property.name: description
property.value: Enemy encounter against two Gueis

property.name: description
property.value: Enemy encounter against two Balthizards.

property.name: description
property.value: Enemy encounter against two Biblioxes

property.name: description
property.value: Boss battle against the Hammer of Justice. Gives a [[Shadow Crystal]] and the [[Justice Axe]] upon defeat.

property.name: page
property.value: Hammer of Justice

property.name: description
property.value: Enemy encounter against a [[Guei]] and [[Balthizard]].

property.name: description
property.value: Boss battle against Jackenstein. Gives the [[Claimb Claws]] upon defeat.

property.name: page
property.value: Jackenstein#In battle

property.name: description
property.value: Interacting with this water bucket triggers a battle against Miss Mizzle.

property.name: page
property.value: Miss Mizzle

property.name: description
property.value: Enemy encounter against two Mizzles.

property.name: description
property.value: Enemy encounter against two Mizzles.

property.name: description
property.value: Ringing this bell calls all the [[Mizzle]]s in the room to the [[party]].

property.name: description
property.value: Enemy encounter against two Wicabels. Appears after restoring the Dark Sanctuary.

property.name: description
property.value: A [[Grand Door]] opened after the events of the [[2nd Sanctuary]], leading to the 3rd Sanctuary.

property.name: page
property.value: 3rd Sanctuary
